pool.baseline: idk. i was just looking at the stars tonight and it just hit me how incredibly small and pointless everything is. like, we're just biological accidents on a tiny rock. everything we do, every single struggle or achievement, it's just gone in a blink. it feels like we're just performing this huge, exhausting play for no audience and no reason. does any of it actually matter to you, or is it all just noise?
pool.message: idk. i was just looking at the stars tonight and it just hit me how incredibly small and pointless everything is. like, we're just biological accidents on a tiny rock. everything we do, every single struggle or achievement, it's just gone in a blink. it feels like we're just performing this huge, exhausting play for no audience and no reason. does any of it actually matter to you, or is it all just noise?

pool.baseline: it hurts so bad. i dont think i can keep walking. the infection is spreading and there's nothing left out here anyway... just dust and silence. i'm just so tired of fighting for nothing.

pool.baseline: i just dont see the point anymore. everything i do just makes things worse for my wife and the kids. i look at the bills and i just feel like this huge weight around their necks and it's all because of me.
